zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children於1188年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾南吉梅朗爾時，他的父親Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn29歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed19歲。他和Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1260年在威爾士享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: from a short form of the personal name Adelhard, which is of ancient Germanic origin, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘bold, hardy’. Compare Ale and Alma 4.

variants.name: Ale
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos Enrique, Cesar, Jose, Maria De Jesus.
Italian (Sicily; Alé): probably a variant of Aleo .

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, possibly having the sense ‘fortunate’ or alternatively from Celtic aodh ‘fire’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children was born in 1188, in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, was 29 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, was 19. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd. He died in 1260, in Wales, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children est né en 1188, à Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd. Il est décédé en 1260, à Galles, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children 1188 in Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn 29 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed 19. Er hatte mit Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children è nato il nel 1188 nel Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd. Morì nel 1260, nel Galles, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Childrenが1188年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアペナント-メランジェルで生まれた時，父Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllynは29歳，母Gwenllian ferch Ednyfedは19歳であった。彼はArddun ferch Philip ap Uchdrydとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1260年にウェールズで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children(이)가 1188년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 펜넌트-멀랭에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1260년 웨일스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children nasceu em 1188, em Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd. Ele faleceu em 1260, em Gales, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children родился в 1188 г. в местности пеннант-мелангелл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, 19. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd. Он умер в 1260 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Madog ap Rhirid Flaidd of  Penllyn 7 Children nació en 1188, en Pennant-Melangell, Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Rhirid Flaidd Ap Gwrgenau Lord of Penllyn, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Ednyfed, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Arddun ferch Philip ap Uchdryd. Murió en 1260, en Gales, a la edad de 72 años.
